global.summary: Queensway Carleton Hospital Foundation raises community support for Queensway Carleton Hospital — funding medical equipment, building improvements, and priority campaigns that help deliver world-class care in west Ottawa.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Take in an aerial view of Queensway Carleton Hospital and the surrounding community. QCH provides care to half of Ottawa's population — and community support through the Foundation helps purchase critical medical equipment and fund hospital priorities.
facts: QCH opened in 1976 and today serves roughly half of Ottawa's population.
The Emergency Department is one of the busiest in Ontario, with more than 80,000 visits each year.
QCH Foundation is accredited under Imagine Canada's National Standards Program.

faqs.a: Donations fund medical equipment, building improvements, and priority campaigns such as surgical suite upgrades, MRI replacement, and new patient care spaces at Queensway Carleton Hospital.

faqs.q: How can I contact the Foundation?
faqs.a: Call 613-721-4731, email info@qchfoundation.ca, or visit qchfoundation.ca. The office is at 3045 Baseline Road, Ottawa, ON K2H 8P4.
Visit qchfoundation.ca to give online, become a monthly donor, explore Giftabulator®, or learn about gifts in your will and other ways to give.
